heading: Overview
body:
Learn how to configure your application's connection to a MongoDB
deployment using the Node.js driver. In the following sections, you will
learn:

- [How to Create a MongoClient](node-mongoclient)

- [Specify Connection Options](node-connection-options)

- [How to Enable Network Compression](node-network-compression)

- [Enable TLS on a Connection](node-connect-tls)

- [Enable SOCKS5 Proxy Support](node-connect-socks)

- [Limit Server Execution Time](node-csot)

- [How to Connect to MongoDB Atlas from AWS Lambda](atlas/manage-connections-aws-lambda)
